title: Pensions schemes newsletter 167 — March 2025
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC’s Pension Schemes Services to update stakeholders on the latest news for pension schemes. Pension schemes newsletter 167 has articles on:    the Managing pension schemes service transfers to Qualifying Recognised Overseas Pension Schemes (QROPS) Qualifying Recognised Overseas Pension Schemes (QROPS) lifetime allowance (LTA) abolition lump sum reporting relief at source   "
